title: Khaitan & Co opens new office in GIFT City
description: Khaitan & Co has announced the opening of its new office in Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City), signalling its entry into one of India’s fastest-growing financial and commercial centres.The new office marks a notable step in the Firm’s ambitious roadmap, following the opening of its Ahmedabad office in 2024. The new office will bring together the Firm’s capabilities across financial services, corporate and M&A, investment funds, regulatory, dispute resolution, project fin
